svg.title: Nav And Failsafe Context To IBOX Route Service Flags Signal Flow

g.text: Nav And Failsafe Context To IBOX Route Service Flags Signal Flow
(vehicle/nav context + fail-safe state -> IBOX link, route, and service-flag aggregation)
from route class, nav direction, zone distance
1. Vehicle, navigation, alert, and fail-safe context reach IBOX
2. IBOX evaluates freshness and route activity
3. IBOX derives link mode, route state, and service flag aggregation
4. IBOX exposes the final runtime service posture to observers
